name: Swiss Steak in Crock Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into serving-size pieces and dredge in flour, then brown in oil in a large skillet.
2. Add the browned meat to the crock-pot.
3. Sauté the chopped onion in the same skillet, then add it to the crock-pot.
4. Pour the beef bouillon over the meat.
5. Cook for 6 to 8 hours on low heat (or 4 to 6 hours on high heat).
6. Serves 6 to 8 people.
